mapper.select: SELECT * FROM news WHERE status = 1 ORDER BY create_time DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{size}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM news WHERE status = 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO news ( title, content, source, cover, view_count, like_count, status ) VALUES ( #{title}, #{content}, #{source}, #{cover}, #{viewCount}, #{likeCount}, #{status} )
mapper.update: UPDATE news SET title = #{title}, content = #{content}, source = #{source}, cover = #{cover}, view_count = #{viewCount}, like_count = #{likeCount}, status = #{status} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT MIN(id) as id, source as name, '🔥' as icon, COUNT(*) as count FROM news WHERE source IS NOT NULL AND source != '' GROUP BY source ORDER BY count DESC
SELECT id, title, content, cover, create_time, view_count, source FROM news ORDER BY view_count DESC, create_time DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT id, title, content, cover, create_time, view_count, source FROM news ORDER BY view_count DESC LIMIT #{size}
SELECT id, title, content, cover, create_time, view_count, source FROM news ORDER BY view_count DESC, create_time DESC LIMIT #{size}
SELECT id, title, content, cover, create_time, view_count, source FROM news WHERE content LIKE '%视频%' OR title LIKE '%视频%' ORDER BY create_time DESC LIMIT #{size}
